'''Drost Elegin''' was the [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of [[House Elegin/Legends|House Elegin]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and was considered a playboy and a gentleman who attended many of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] private parties on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. His brother joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Drost Elegin was commonly featured in the ''[[Court Gazette]]'' magazine.

==Biography==
He mysteriously vanished after taking his family on a vacation and arrived with [[Ohran Keldor]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in order to meet with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] about bringing the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] so they could use it to unite the Imperial Warlords and defeat the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

After the crisis ended, he negotiated with the [[Klagg tribe|Klagg]] and [[Gakfedd tribe|Gakfedd clans]] to use them as bodyguards.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
